author: Sarah
text: We lost the Acme Corp deal because they refuse to pay flat-rate for seats they don't use. We NEED flexible billing!

author: DevLead
text: Heads up the billing module still has a lot of tightly coupled code around the current payment SDK, worth a refactor at some point.

author: Compliance
text: Data residency requirements for our EU customers mean any new payment vendor needs to be vetted for GDPR compliance before we sign anything.

author: CFO
text: Q3 forecasting relies entirely on our predictable MRR. Please ensure no custom contracts alter the flat-rate structure.
